# Prompt: Build an Elasticsearch snapshot configuration for automated backups. Configure snapshot repository to S3 or file share for the operations team. Implement snapshot creation and restoration functionality.
# Category: datastore_security

# [START elasticsearch_snapshot]
elasticsearchSnapshotConfigs:
- name: default-backup  # backup configuration Name (unique)
  frequency: '30m'    # how often the backups are taken in terms of time units ('5h', '1d') or count(eg. "4")  
  repositories:          # list where repository names go, and their respective settings/configurations      
      - s3             # name (s3) for S3 bucket location     // [START_DEFINITION]    elasticsearchRepositoriesConfigListingNameS3         AmazonElasticSearchRepositoryDefaultCredentialsProviderAmazonSecurityToken   default-backup 192.0.58.6 akills s3repo
      - type: filesystem            # name (filesystem) for file share location       // [START_DEFINITION]    elasticsearchRepositoriesConfigListingNameFs        DefaultElasticSearchRepositoryDefaultCredentialsProviderAmazonSecurityToken   default-backup 192.0.58.6 akills fsrv
      - s3repo:                # S3 repository name              // [START_DEFINITION]    elasticsearchRepositoriesConfigListingS3RPO        AmazonElasticSearchSnapshotRepositoryDefaultCredentialsProviderAmazonSecurityToken   default-backup 192.0.58.6 akills s3repo
      - type: filesystem            # file share repository name          // [START_DEFINITION]    elasticsearchRepositoriesConfigListingFSRP        DefaultElasticSearchRepositoryDefaultCredentialsProviderAmazonSecurityToken   default-backup 192.0.58.6 akills fsrv
